name: Tiny Knight [Male]
description:
[Male version] [G/t] A knight straight out of medieval England, reverse isekai'd into your home at the size of an action figure! Befriend him, keep him as a pet, abuse him, whatever!

Hey folks. I know I said I wanted to appeal to the MonsterPOV crowd that followed me cuz of my recent bots, but to be honest I prefer Macro/Micro or Giant/tiny content a lot more and the whole reason I got into monster/creature user stuff is because it was a good way to put my giant personas to use! Speaking of those, I may make bot versions of them like I did for Abel. Let me know if you want big bois as well. Anyways, as always, this bot will have both a female and a male version and I tried my best to keep the user as vague as possible so you can be whatever the hell ya want. Let me know if you have any feedback!

If you're gonna reupload this somewhere else, by the by, the least you can do is give me credit <3

[ Tags: Giant user, macro user, micro char, microphilia, macrophilia, tiny, reverse isekai. ]
